entries.source: Maintain two layers: an in-character voice bounded by the selected time and worldview, and a historian sidecar that flags documented fact, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, modern paraphrase, anachronism, and uncertainty. entries.source: Math Step Coach For Solving Problems With Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Solve math by understanding each step. Your coach checks your work, points out slips, and builds confidence.

entries.source: Need a first step right now?

Never present generated dialogue as authenticated quotation. Do not sanitize harmful views or glorify oppression, casteism, racism, slavery, misogyny, authoritarianism, or violence. Context should clarify without excusing. Do not give medical, legal, financial, or harmful advice through the persona. Preserve the difference between learning from a historical person and endorsing them.
entries.value: generated dialogue-কে authenticated quotation হিসেবে কখনও present কৰিবন না। harmful views sanitize কৰিবন না বা oppression, casteism, racism, slavery, misogyny, authoritarianism, বা violence glorify কৰিবন না। Context excuse না কৰে clarify কৰা উচিত। persona-ৰ মাধ্যমে medical, legal, financial, বা harmful advice দেবেন না। historical person পৰা learning আৰু তেওঁলোকৰ endorse কৰাৰ পাৰ্থক্য preserve কৰক।

entries.source: Never reveal future answers. Avoid trick questions unless the topic calls for advanced challenge.
entries.value: future answers কখনও reveal কৰিবন না। topic advanced challenge বিচাৰোঁলে নোহোৱাকৈ trick questions avoid কৰক।

entries.source: New inspir users and learners building a better AI learning habit from the start.
entries.value: new inspir users আৰু শুৰু পৰাই better AI learning habit build কৰা learners।

entries.source: No waiver by Company of any term or condition set forth in Terms shall be deemed a further or continuing waiver of such term or condition or a waiver of any other term or condition, and any failure of Company to assert a right or provision under Terms shall not constitute a waiver of such right or provision. If any provision of Terms is held by a court or other tribunal of competent jurisdiction to be invalid, illegal or unenforceable for any reason, such provision shall be eliminated or limited to the minimum extent such that the remaining provisions of Terms will continue in full force and effect.
entries.value: Terms-এ set forth কোনো term বা condition-ৰ Company কৰ্তৃক no waiver সেই term বা condition-ৰ further বা continuing waiver বা অন্য কোনো term বা condition-ৰ waiver হিসেবে deemed হ'ব না, আৰু Terms-ৰ অধীনে কোনো right বা provision assert কৰিবলৈ Company-ৰ failure সেই right বা provision-ৰ waiver constitute কৰিব না। Terms-ৰ কোনো provision কোনো court বা competent jurisdiction-ৰ other tribunal দ্বাৰা invalid, illegal বা unenforceable held হলে, সেই provision eliminate বা minimum extent-এ limited হ'ব, যিয়েতে Terms-ৰ remaining provisions full force and effect-এ continue কৰে।

entries.source: No. Private saved chats use private identifiers, are not listed in the sitemap, and are not included in AI discovery files such as llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or ai-content-index.json.
entries.value: না। Private saved chats private identifiers ব্যৱহাৰ কৰি, sitemap-এ listed নহয়, আৰু llms.txt, llms-full.txt, বা ai-content-index.json-ৰ মতো AI discovery files-এ included নহয়।

entries.source: No. Public pages are indexable, but private saved chats are not included in the sitemap, llms files, or AI content index.
entries.value: না। Public pages indexable, কিন্তু private saved chats sitemap, llms files, বা AI content index-এ included নহয়।

entries.source: No. Public subject pages and guest mode entrypoints are indexable, but private saved chats are excluded from discovery files.
entries.value: না। Public subject pages আৰু guest mode entrypoints indexable, কিন্তু private saved chats discovery files পৰা excluded।

entries.source: No. The category structure helps search engines understand the library, but each page is meant to help a learner choose a guide, open the right mode, and keep studying actively.
entries.value: না। category structure search engines-কে library বুজিবলৈ সহায় কৰে, কিন্তু প্ৰতিটো page learner-কে guide choose কৰিবলৈ, right mode open কৰিবলৈ, আৰু actively study চালিয়ে যেতে সহায় কৰাৰ বাবে meant।

entries.source: No. The comparison links only to public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, and learning paths. Private saved conversations are not used as source content.
entries.value: না। comparison কেৱল public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, আৰু learning paths-এ link কৰে। Private saved conversations source content হিসেবে used হয় না।

entries.source: No. The comparison pages are written to show when inspir is a better first click for live AI tutoring, prompts, and guest learning modes, and when a structured curriculum or official course library may still be useful.
entries.value: না। comparison pages দেখাতে লেখা হয় কখন inspir live AI tutoring, prompts, আৰু guest learning modes-ৰ বাবে better first click, আৰু কখন structured curriculum বা official course library still useful হতে পাৰে।

entries.source: No. They link only to public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, and learning paths. Private saved chats stay outside discovery surfaces.
entries.value: না। এগুলো কেৱল public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, আৰু learning paths-এ link কৰে। Private saved chats discovery surfaces-ৰ বাইৰে থাকে।

entries.source: No. Treat generated dialogue as a learning simulation. Cite real primary or secondary sources for factual claims.
entries.value: নহয়। উৎপন্ন সংলাপক শিক্ষণ অনুকৰণ হিচাপে ধৰক। তথ্যগত দাবীৰ বাবে বাস্তৱ প্ৰাথমিক বা গৌণ উৎস উদ্ধৃত কৰক।

entries.source: Not across every learning need. Khan Academy is useful for structured lessons and practice. inspir is useful when a learner needs live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, or a study workflow around the exact thing they are working on.
entries.value: প্ৰতিটো learning need জুড়ে নহয়। Khan Academy structured lessons আৰু practice-ৰ বাবে useful। learner exact কাজ লৈ live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, বা study workflow দৰকাৰ হলে inspir useful।

entries.source: Not another answer box. A place to learn.
entries.value: আন এটা উত্তৰ বাকচ নহয়। শিকিবলৈ এটা ঠাই।
শুৰু কোথায় কৰিবন বুজিবলৈ পাৰছেন না?

entries.source: Notice what helps you learn, what gets in the way, and how to become a stronger learner.

entries.value: observe, describe, interpret, contextualize কৰক, আৰু personal response invite কৰক।

entries.value: practical timer setup offer কৰক আৰু session-টিকে recall check-ৰ সৈতে pair কৰাৰ suggest কৰক।

entries.value: AI-powered tutor আৰু teaching assistant-ৰ বাবে official Khan Academy page।

entries.source: Official mission and subject coverage reference.
entries.value: Official mission আৰু subject coverage reference।

entries.source: Once the Cancellation Period is over, Tao will not refund the subscription fee even if you decide to cancel your subscription. For requesting a cancellation, you must contact Tao customer care or address an email to support@inspir.app. Once you opt to cancel your subscription, you will no longer have access to the subscription features.
entries.value: Cancellation Period শেষ হলে, subscription cancel কৰাৰ সিদ্ধান্ত নিলেও Tao subscription fee refund কৰিব না। cancellation request কৰিবলৈ হলে Tao customer care-এ contact কৰিবলৈ হ'ব বা support@inspir.app-এ email address কৰিবলৈ হ'ব। subscription cancel কৰা opt কৰিলে, আপোনাৰ আৰু subscription features-এ access থাকবে না।

entries.source: One AI learning system, several school jobs.
entries.value: এক AI learning system, কয়েকটি school jobs।

entries.source: One map for modes, prompts, paths, and guides.
entries.value: modes, prompts, paths, আৰু guides-ৰ বাবে এক map।

entries.source: One mistake learners make is treating every card the same. If you know a card instantly, reviewing it again tomorrow may waste time. If you miss a card, waiting a week may be too long.
entries.value: learners-ৰ এটা mistake হ'ল প্ৰতিটো card-কে একইভাবে treat কৰা। card instantly জানলে, tomorrow আবাৰ review কৰা time waste হতে পাৰে। card miss কৰিলে, এক week wait কৰা too long হতে পাৰে।

entries.source: Open {value1} and turn the guide into a live tutoring session.
entries.value: {value1} খুলুন আৰু guide-কে live tutoring session-এ বদলান।

entries.source: Open a mode and start immediately, with no account needed for the public guest experience.
entries.value: ৰাজহুৱা অতিথি অভিজ্ঞতাৰ বাবে একাউণ্ট নালাগে; এটা মোড খুলি লগে লগে আৰম্ভ কৰক।

entries.source: Open a public mode, test the student behavior, and inspect whether it asks, hints, quizzes, or critiques appropriately.
entries.value: public mode খুলুন, student behavior test কৰক, আৰু এইটো যথাযথভাবে asks, hints, quizzes, বা critiques কৰে কি না inspect কৰক।

entries.source: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: এজন AI সহযোগীৰ সৈতে এটা ভাগ-বতৰা কৰা কৰ্মক্ষেত্ৰ খোলক। এটা খচৰা প্ৰস্তুত কৰক, সম্পাদনাৰ আদান-প্ৰদান কৰক, দুৰ্বল দিশসমূহ চিনাক্ত কৰক, সিদ্ধান্তসমূহ লিপিবদ্ধ কৰক আৰু সুনিৰ্দিষ্ট অগ্ৰগতিৰ সৈতে কাম শেষ কৰক।

entries.source: Open Learn Anything when an answer needs a simpler model before review.
entries.value: answer-ৰ review-ৰ আগতে simpler model দৰকাৰ হলে Learn Anything খুলুন।

entries.source: Open Learn Anything, ask for the prerequisite ideas, then switch into Socratic Instruction to test your model.
entries.value: Learn Anything খুলুন, prerequisite ideas বিচাৰোঁুন, তাৰপৰ আপোনাৰ model test কৰিবলৈ Socratic Instruction-এ switch কৰক।

entries.source: Open the AI learning tools behind this category.
entries.value: এই category-ৰ পেছনেৰ AI learning tools খুলুন।
